description: Northwind Traders is launching a new specialty tea product line. Set up the inventory for Chai Tea (unit: box, sales price: $19.50, purchase price: $7.25), English Breakfast Tea (unit: box, sales price: $16.00, purchase price: $5.80), and Darjeeling Reserve (unit: box, sales price: $34.00, purchase price: $12.00). Process a sales invoice for Alfreds Futterkiste for 5 boxes of Chai Tea and 10 boxes of English Breakfast Tea. Record a 50% deposit receipt from Alfreds Futterkiste into Cash on Hand and issue a credit note for 2 damaged boxes of Chai Tea. Verify the invoice is recorded in the sales invoices list. Login: administrator (no password) at http://localhost:8080
